text:
Once upon a time in a quiet town called Everwood, lived a curious cat named Patches. Patches loved wandering the cobblestone paths at the edge of town, dreaming of distant lands. Every morning, he would scamper from attic to garden, searching for new adventures. There was a peculiar old tree at the edge of the town square, which was said to have listened to every trick the cat heard.

One fateful day, while peering into its gnarled branches, Patches overheard a wise old owl discussing the legends of a mythical map. This wasn’t just any map—it was said to lead somewhere wonderful, filled with endless adventures. Intrigued, Patches followed the owl’s beak feathers to an old bookstore filled with tomes that whispered secrets.

Inside the dusty old place, under the careful scan of a reticulated pyrmont lizard, Patches found a book titled "The Chronicles of Everhaven." It outlined the history of Everwood and
